get.description: Return the seven Kyros clinical verticals for display on the public website.

schema.title: Response List Conditions V1 Public Conditions Get

post.description:
Submit a pre-account booking inquiry from the public website booking flow.

No authentication required. A care coordinator will follow up within 4 hours.
Intake responses are stored as JSONB — no PHI beyond name and contact details.

put.description: Register or update the Expo push token for push notification delivery.

schema.title: Response Razorpay Webhook V1 Webhooks Razorpay Post
Response List Available Slots V1 Clinic Patient Consultations Slots Get

patch.description: Allow patient to correct OCR-parsed biomarker data.

post.description:
Submit bank account details for revenue share.

Details are encrypted at rest; a verification alert is sent to super admin.

schema.title: Response List Consultation Notes V1 Doctor Consultations  Consultation Id  Notes Get

post.description: Enqueue an on-demand report generation task.  Returns immediately with task_id.

schema.title: Response List Schedule V1 Doctor Schedule Get
Response List Patient Lab Reports V1 Doctor Patients  Patient Id  Lab Reports Get

patch.description:
Annotate a patient's lab report with commentary and/or attention flags.

The report must belong to a patient on the doctor's panel.
Body may contain `commentary` (dict biomarker→text) and/or
`patient_attention_flags` (list of biomarker names).
At least one field must be provided.

post.description:
Publish content with doctor approval.

The approving user must be a doctor (super_admin role with a dr_doctors row).
Stores reviewed_by_doctor_id for NMC TPG compliance audit trail.
Mark an intake consultation as confirmed and optionally add coordinator notes.
Escalate emergency intake to super admin.
Send a pre-approved template message via WhatsApp or email.

message.title: Message
message.default: OTP sent to your Aadhaar-linked mobile number

abha_number.title: Abha Number
abha_number.description: 14-digit ABHA health ID, with or without dashes

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: Patient's self-reported gender. Required for coordinator handoff.

intake_responses.title: Intake Responses
intake_responses.description: Condition-specific intake answers. Empty when skipped.

skipped_intake.title: Skipped Intake
skipped_intake.description: True when the patient skipped intake and chose direct coordinator contact.
